guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference runs off the main thread via a Web Worker (or MediaPipe delegate); control UI stays responsive.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: verify — responsive-desktop/mobile conformance assertions checked (see rubric).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Flex-wrap + flex-basis with intrinsic sizing and logical properties; wrap in overflow-x:auto for wide content (the matrix) so nothing overflows narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — control panels use flex-wrap:wrap with flex:1 1 <basis>; the similarity matrix sits in a .matrix-scroll (overflow-x:auto); grids use repeat(auto-fit,minmax()); dimensions use inline-size/block-size.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-desktop + responsive-mobile conformance = pass; no horizontal overflow at 360x740 and 1280x800 (reports/responsive/screens/ai-image-detection/)

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Semantic labelled controls, keyboard operability, visible focus, live regions for async status, alt text on images.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — every control labelled; role=button + Enter/Space handlers on dropzone and sample thumbs; :focus-visible outlines; role=status aria-live for load/run status; all images have alt.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance buttons-have-names + images-have-alt + live-status-region = pass; agent read desktop+mobile screenshots

openQuestions: Does ai-image-detection produce semantically correct image-classification output on a real device (manual-evidenced)?
Are all controls keyboard-operable with visible focus on both classes?

followUpGoals.goal: Deepen the ai-image-detection corpus/edge cases and consider a WebGPU fast-path where it helps; matrix pass complete (support=ok).

summary: Revision-2 review for ai-image-detection: real in-browser inference verified end-to-end (download → correct output), auto-init-on-cached confirmed (no Load button on reload), 0 console errors, and a full mobile+desktop matrix read from screenshots — support flipped to ok on both classes. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict here.
